Interface InventoryManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
JDBCInventoryManager
public interface InventoryManager

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addInventory(Inventory inventory)
    Adds a new inventory record.
    Inventory
    findInventory(String pharmacyId, String medicationId)
    Finds an inventory record for a specific pharmacy and medication.
    List<Inventory>
    getLowStockMedications()
    Retrieves a list of medications that have low stock.
    boolean
    increaseStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId, int quantity)
    Increases the stock of a medication in a specific pharmacy.
    boolean
    isLowStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId)
    Checks if a specific medication has low stock in a pharmacy.
    boolean
    isOutOfStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId)
    Checks if a specific medication is completely out of stock in a pharmacy.
    boolean
    reduceStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId, int quantity)
    Reduces the stock of a medication in a specific pharmacy.
    boolean
    updateInventoryInformation(String pharmacyId, String medicationId, double price, double purchasePrice, String expirationDate, String supplierId)
    Updates the inventory information such as price, expiration date, and supplier.

  • Method Details

    • findInventory

      Inventory findInventory(String pharmacyId, String medicationId)
      Finds an inventory record for a specific pharmacy and medication.
      Parameters:
      pharmacyId - the ID of the pharmacy
      medicationId - the ID of the medication
      Returns:
      the inventory object if found, null otherwise

    • increaseStock

      boolean increaseStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId, int quantity)
      Increases the stock of a medication in a specific pharmacy.
      Parameters:
      pharmacyId - the ID of the pharmacy
      medicationId - the ID of the medication
      quantity - the amount to increase the stock by
      Returns:
      true if the stock was successfully increased, false otherwise

    • reduceStock

      boolean reduceStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId, int quantity)
      Reduces the stock of a medication in a specific pharmacy.
      Parameters:
      pharmacyId - the ID of the pharmacy
      medicationId - the ID of the medication
      quantity - the amount to reduce the stock by
      Returns:
      true if the stock was successfully reduced, false otherwise

    • addInventory

      boolean addInventory(Inventory inventory)
      Adds a new inventory record. In use case 5: after adding a medicine, it is also added to the inventory.
      Parameters:
      inventory - the inventory object to add
      Returns:
      true if the inventory was successfully added, false otherwise

    • updateInventoryInformation

      boolean updateInventoryInformation(String pharmacyId, String medicationId, double price, double purchasePrice, String expirationDate, String supplierId)
      Updates the inventory information such as price, expiration date, and supplier.
      Parameters:
      pharmacyId - the ID of the pharmacy
      medicationId - the ID of the medication
      price - the new price
      purchasePrice - the new purchase price
      expirationDate - the new expiration date
      supplierId - the new supplier ID
      Returns:
      true if the inventory information was successfully updated, false otherwise

    • getLowStockMedications

      List<Inventory> getLowStockMedications()
      Retrieves a list of medications that have low stock.
      Returns:
      a list of inventory objects with low stock

    • isLowStock

      boolean isLowStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId)
      Checks if a specific medication has low stock in a pharmacy.
      Parameters:
      pharmacyId - the ID of the pharmacy
      medicationId - the ID of the medication
      Returns:
      true if the stock is low, false otherwise

    • isOutOfStock

      boolean isOutOfStock(String pharmacyId, String medicationId)
      Checks if a specific medication is completely out of stock in a pharmacy.
      Parameters:
      pharmacyId - the ID of the pharmacy
      medicationId - the ID of the medication
      Returns:
      true if the medication is out of stock, false otherwise
